meta.title: Nano Banana x Veo 3 is CRAZY for Making AI Videos of Yourself
meta.description:
Learn how to use nano banana and veo3 for making AI videos of yourself
Try Nano Banana & Veo 3  on Artlist 👉 https://artlist.io/artlist-70446/?artlist_aid=DanKieft_3875&utm_source=affiliate_p&utm_medium=DanKieft_3875&utm_campaign=DanKieft_3875

In this video I explore how to make AI Videos of yourself using Nano Banana AI image editor and Google Veo3 Inside of Artlist Max. Artlist now include AI video generators and ai image generators which make it a complete all in one tool that you can use for your videos

My prompts used in this video:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/19n4qcnBj67yvxChNJ-qilWt_qb6pSpW6pVw6JWYHd9o/edit?usp=sharing

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.
